---
name: Feature / improvement request
about: Suggest something to add or change
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What's missing or could be better**
A clear description of the gap.

**Is this already on the roadmap?**
Check [`docs/roadmap.md`](../../docs/roadmap.md) first — if it's there,
comment on why it should move up rather than filing a duplicate.

**Proposed approach**
How you'd build it, if you have an idea. Link any prior art (a similar
pattern elsewhere in this repo, or a project you'd model it on).

**What alternative did you consider, and why not that instead?**
This repo's design decisions (`docs/decisions/`) are all framed this
way — a proposal without this is harder to evaluate.
